entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop affected by a viral disease in the Sudan

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: A symptom of the disease characterized by reduced growth

entities.name: DOWNWARD ROLLING
entities.description: A symptom of the disease where leaves roll downwards

entities.name: MOTTLING
entities.description: A symptom of the disease characterized by irregular spots or blotches of color

entities.name: GENERAL CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A symptom of the disease characterized by yellowing of leaf tissue

entities.name: REDUCED LEAFLET SIZE
entities.description: A symptom of the disease where leaflets are smaller than normal

entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: The country where the disease occurrence was recorded

entities.name: 2 NILES
entities.description: The specific region in Sudan where irrigated groundnut crops were grown

entities.name: WHITEFLIES
entities.description: The insect vector responsible for transmitting the virus

entities.name: COWPEA MILD MOTTLE CARLAVIRUS
entities.description: The viral causal agent of the disease, also known as CPMMV

entities.name: SEROLOGICAL IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The method used to identify the virus

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The water management practice associated with the affected groundnut crops
